rows.brief: Build a team chat app where companies create workspaces, users join channels and DMs, send messages with attachments, and stay connected in real-time. Production product, not a demo.

modules_detailed.title: User Authentication
modules_detailed.description: Manage user registration, login, and secure sessions.

modules_detailed.title: Workspace Creation
modules_detailed.description: Allow companies to create and manage their workspaces.

modules_detailed.title: Channel Management
modules_detailed.description: Create, join, and manage communication channels within workspaces.

modules_detailed.title: Direct Messaging
modules_detailed.description: Enable one-on-one conversation between users through DMs.

modules_detailed.title: Real-time Messaging
modules_detailed.description: Implement live message delivery and updates across all channels and DMs.

modules_detailed.title: Attachments & File Sharing
modules_detailed.description: Allow users to send and receive files within messages.

modules_detailed.title: Roles & Permissions
modules_detailed.description: Define user roles and access levels within workspaces and channels.

modules_detailed.title: Observability & Logging
modules_detailed.description: Setup logging and monitoring for application health and usage insights.

modules_detailed.title: Deployment & CI/CD
modules_detailed.description: Establish CI/CD pipelines for automated deployment and integration.

modules_detailed.title: Message Retries
modules_detailed.description: Implement retries for message delivery to ensure fault tolerance.

modules_detailed.title: Input Validation
modules_detailed.description: Ensure proper validation of user inputs to prevent errors and security issues.

rows.brief: Build a fast issue tracker for software teams. Users create issues, assign owners, move them through statuses on a board, and see updates live as teammates work. Long-term product, multiple companies use it.

modules_detailed.title: User authentication
modules_detailed.description: Manage user registrations, logins, and authentication workflows.

modules_detailed.title: Role-based access
modules_detailed.description: Implement user roles to control access to various features and data.

modules_detailed.title: Issue management
modules_detailed.description: Allow users to create, assign, and update issues easily.

modules_detailed.title: Workflow board
modules_detailed.description: Visual representation of issues in different statuses on a board.

modules_detailed.title: Live updates
modules_detailed.description: Implement real-time updates for issues and board status changes.

modules_detailed.title: Notifications system
modules_detailed.description: Notify users about updates and changes to assigned issues.

modules_detailed.title: Analytics dashboard
modules_detailed.description: Provide insights and statistics on issues and team performance.

modules_detailed.title: Observability & logging
modules_detailed.description: Set up monitoring and logging for system performance and error tracking.

modules_detailed.title: Deployment & CI/CD
modules_detailed.description: Automate deployment and integrate continuous delivery processes.

modules_detailed.title: Retries and Rollback
modules_detailed.description: Implement retry logic, rollback mechanisms, and ensure data integrity for issue updates.

modules_detailed.title: Input Validation Tests
modules_detailed.description: Create validation tests for user inputs and issue updates to handle edge cases.

rows.brief: Build a payments platform for a specific industry (think: Stripe for law firms). Merchants onboard, accept cards, manage chargebacks, see settlements, and reconcile their books. Production, multi-year horizon.

modules_detailed.title: User authentication
modules_detailed.description: Secure onboarding and login processes for merchants and users.

modules_detailed.title: Merchant onboarding
modules_detailed.description: Process for onboarding new merchants with necessary compliance checks.

modules_detailed.title: Payments processing
modules_detailed.description: Handle card transactions, including authorization and settlement.

modules_detailed.title: Chargeback management
modules_detailed.description: Tools to help merchants handle and respond to chargebacks effectively.

modules_detailed.title: Transaction reporting
modules_detailed.description: Reports for merchants to view transaction history and settlements.

modules_detailed.title: Reconciliation tools
modules_detailed.description: Features for merchants to reconcile their accounts and manage finances.

modules_detailed.title: Observability & logging
modules_detailed.description: Set up monitoring and logging for system performance and issue tracking.

modules_detailed.title: Roles & permissions
modules_detailed.description: Management of user roles and permissions for secure access control.

modules_detailed.title: Deployment & CI/CD
modules_detailed.description: Automated deployment strategies and continuous integration pipelines.

modules_detailed.title: Idempotency Guarantees
modules_detailed.description: Implement idempotency for payment workflows to avoid duplicate transactions.

modules_detailed.title: Error Handling Strategies
modules_detailed.description: Define error handling procedures for transaction failures and system malfunctions.

rows.brief: Build a CRM for B2B sales teams: contacts, accounts, deals in a pipeline, activity timeline, email integration, reports. Each company has 20-200 reps. Real product, paying customers expected.

modules_detailed.title: User authentication
modules_detailed.description: Secure login and user registration for CRM access.

modules_detailed.title: Roles & permissions
modules_detailed.description: Define access levels for different user roles in the CRM.

modules_detailed.title: Contacts management
modules_detailed.description: Add, edit, and organize contacts in the CRM.

modules_detailed.title: Accounts management
modules_detailed.description: Manage accounts associated with contacts and deals.

modules_detailed.title: Deals pipeline
modules_detailed.description: Track deals through various stages in the sales pipeline.

modules_detailed.title: Activity timeline
modules_detailed.description: Log activities related to contacts and deals for viewing history.

modules_detailed.title: Email integration
modules_detailed.description: Connect and sync email accounts for communication tracking.

modules_detailed.title: Reporting & analytics
modules_detailed.description: Generate reports on sales performance and user activities.

modules_detailed.title: Deployment & CI/CD
modules_detailed.description: Set up continuous integration and delivery for the application.

modules_detailed.title: Observability & logging
modules_detailed.description: Implement logging and monitoring for performance and issues.

modules_detailed.title: Fault Tolerance
modules_detailed.description: Implement retry logic and error handling for robust operations.

modules_detailed.title: Edge Case Testing
modules_detailed.description: Test for unusual scenarios and validation rules for data integrity.

rows.brief: Build an AI copilot inside a domain SaaS app (e.g. legal). Users chat with the assistant, it pulls from their documents, drafts responses, learns their style. Production-grade product with paying users.

modules_detailed.title: User Authentication
modules_detailed.description: Secure user authentication to access the AI copilot features.

modules_detailed.title: Document Management
modules_detailed.description: Upload, store, and manage user documents for AI processing.

modules_detailed.title: AI Chat Interface
modules_detailed.description: User interface for interacting with the AI copilot in real-time.

modules_detailed.title: Response Drafting
modules_detailed.description: AI generates draft responses based on user documents and chat history.

modules_detailed.title: Style Learning
modules_detailed.description: AI learns and adapts to the user's writing style over time.

modules_detailed.title: Roles & Permissions
modules_detailed.description: Management of user roles and permissions for secure access.

modules_detailed.title: Deployment & CI/CD
modules_detailed.description: Automated deployment pipeline for continuous integration and delivery.

modules_detailed.title: Observability & Logging
modules_detailed.description: Implement logging and monitoring for system performance and user activity.

modules_detailed.title: QA & Validation
modules_detailed.description: Quality assurance processes to validate AI output and overall system.

modules_detailed.title: Retries & Idempotency
modules_detailed.description: Implement retry logic and ensure idempotency for AI requests.

modules_detailed.title: Error Handling Strategy
modules_detailed.description: Define how to handle errors and validate inputs in AI responses.

rows.brief: Build an observability platform: customers send logs/metrics/traces from their infrastructure, we ingest at scale, run queries, build dashboards, fire alerts. Multi-tenant, production, infra-grade reliability.

modules_detailed.title: Data Ingestion
modules_detailed.description: Ingest logs, metrics, and traces from various customer infrastructures.

modules_detailed.title: Query Engine
modules_detailed.description: Engine to run optimized queries on ingested data for analysis.

modules_detailed.title: Dashboard Builder
modules_detailed.description: Tool for users to create and customize their dashboards based on the data.

modules_detailed.title: Alerting System
modules_detailed.description: Trigger alerts based on defined thresholds and conditions in data.

modules_detailed.title: User Authentication
modules_detailed.description: Manage user authentication to ensure secure access to the platform.

modules_detailed.title: Multi-Tenancy Layer
modules_detailed.description: Implement mechanisms to support multiple clients with data isolation.

modules_detailed.title: Observability & Logging
modules_detailed.description: Incorporate logging for observability and debugging of the platform itself.

modules_detailed.title: Deployment & CI/CD
modules_detailed.description: Setup continuous integration and deployment pipelines for platform updates.

modules_detailed.title: Fault Tolerance Mechanisms
modules_detailed.description: Implement retries and fault tolerance for data ingestion and processing.

modules_detailed.title: Input Validation Testing
modules_detailed.description: Thorough validation and testing of data inputs from customers for edge cases.

rows.brief: Build an online marketplace where buyers find services and sellers list offers, messages and bookings happen on-platform, payments held in escrow until delivery, with reviews and dispute handling. Real production product.

modules_detailed.title: User Authentication
modules_detailed.description: Enable users to register, log in, and manage accounts securely.

modules_detailed.title: Service Listings
modules_detailed.description: Allow sellers to create, edit, and manage service offers on the platform.

modules_detailed.title: Search & Filter
modules_detailed.description: Implement search and filtering capabilities for buyers to find services easily.

modules_detailed.title: Booking System
modules_detailed.description: Facilitate on-platform bookings for services with a user-friendly calendar interface.

modules_detailed.title: Payments & Escrow
modules_detailed.description: Manage payment transactions with escrow system for added buyer protection.

modules_detailed.title: Reviews & Ratings
modules_detailed.description: Enable users to rate and review services after completion.

modules_detailed.title: Dispute Handling
modules_detailed.description: Create a process for resolving disputes between buyers and sellers effectively.

modules_detailed.title: Admin Dashboard
modules_detailed.description: Provide administrators with tools to manage users, listings, and transactions.

modules_detailed.title: Logging & Observability
modules_detailed.description: Implement logging for user activities and system observability for monitoring.

modules_detailed.title: Deployment & CI/CD
modules_detailed.description: Set up deployment processes and continuous integration for reliable updates.

modules_detailed.title: Data Integrity Checks
modules_detailed.description: Ensure consistency and validity of data across transactions and user interactions.

modules_detailed.title: Error Handling Strategies
modules_detailed.description: Implement comprehensive error handling for user interactions and system processes.

rows.brief: Build a realtime multiplayer collaborative whiteboard. Multiple users see each other's cursors, edit shapes together with no flicker, comment, share via link. Production product, teams use it daily.

modules_detailed.title: Deployment & CI/CD
modules_detailed.description: Set up continuous integration and deployment for automated builds.

modules_detailed.description: Implement retries and idempotency for critical operations to ensure reliability.

modules_detailed.title: Edge Case Testing
